mapper.select: select testinfo__room.testinfo__room_id, testinfo__room.rquota, testinfo__room.room_id, testinfo__room.testinfo_id, testinfotable.test_id, roomtable.rname, roomtable.raddress, roomtable.rtelnum, roomtable.rpostcode, testinfotable.test_time, testinfotable.regist_start_time, testinfotable.regist_end_time, testinfotable.tprice, testtable.tname, testtable.tsubject, testtable.torganizer, testtable.status from testinfo__room, roomtable, testinfotable, testtable where testinfo__room.room_id = roomtable.room_id and testinfo__room.testinfo_id = testinfotable.testinfo_id and testinfotable.test_id = testtable.test_id
